title: Hiring Production Engineer at MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Hiring Production Engineer at MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Chennai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd:
MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MRF Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
